heading: Right of priority
label: 172 Right of priority
text: The right of priority provided for by subsections (a) through (d) of section 119 shall be six months in the case of designs. The right of priority provided for by section 119(e) shall not apply to designs.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 35, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 32, part (R.S. 4887, amended (1) , , 1226, (2) , , (3) , ).Mar. 3, 1903, ch. 1019, § 132 Stat. 1225June 19, 1936, ch. 59449 Stat. 1529Aug. 5, 1939, ch. 450, § 153 Stat. 1212This provision is taken from R.S. 4887 (see section 119) and made a separate section.
